scenarios.brief: You are MV Blue Duck. Engine room fire is out of control. 6 persons on board, position 32°05'N 034°45'E. Ship is in immediate danger.
You are SY Sea Otter. Hit a submerged object, hull breached, taking water fast. 4 persons on board, position 31°50'N 034°30'E. Vessel will sink within minutes.
You are MV Northern Star. Collided with another vessel, severe damage to bow, taking water. 12 persons on board, position 33°10'N 035°02'E.

facts.nature: Collided with another vessel and taking water

scenarios.brief: You are SY Red Fox. Engine has failed, drifting toward a traffic separation scheme. Not in immediate danger, but need a tow. 3 persons on board, position 32°15'N 034°40'E.
You are MV Grey Whale. Crew member with serious chest pain, need medical advice and possible evacuation. 8 persons on board, position 31°45'N 034°20'E.

facts.nature: Medical emergency, suspected heart attack on board
facts.assistance: I require medical advice and possible evacuation

scenarios.brief: You are MV Silver Arrow. Lost steering, vessel manoeuvring with difficulty in busy shipping lane. Position 32°30'N 034°55'E.

facts.assistance: Request other vessels to keep clear

scenarios.brief: You are MV Cape Runner. Sighted a partly submerged shipping container drifting in a busy shipping lane, hazard to navigation. Position 32°20'N 034°50'E.
You are MV Osprey. Lateral buoy reported unlit at the harbour approach. Position 31°55'N 034°35'E.
You are MV Storm Petrel. Observed sudden gale-force squalls in the area, hazard to small craft. Position 33°00'N 035°00'E.
You abandoned ship and are aboard the Albatross life raft. Your Radar SART has just activated and is being tracked by passing ships. 4 persons on board. Make the distress call.

facts.sartAddressee: Ship who received my Radar SART

scenarios.brief: You are aboard the Petrel life raft and sight a red-hulled cargo ship on the horizon, off the ship's starboard side. 5 persons on board. Make the distress call to the sighted ship.

facts.position: I am on your starboard side

scenarios.brief: Haifa Rescue Coordination Centre acknowledged your earlier MAYDAY. Respond to RCC and request fast vessels to evacuate your crew. You are sailboat Sea Otter.

facts.actionRequest: Send fast ships to the distress area to evacuate the crew
